description: Tests the assigner agent's routing accuracy on ambiguous prompts

evals.name: accuracy-drop-to-eda
evals.prompt: Our model accuracy dropped from 95% to 60% after last week's data update
evals.rationale: Data-oriented context about accuracy drop suggests data investigation

evals.name: create-dashboard-to-developer
evals.prompt: Create a dashboard showing model performance over time
evals.rationale: 'Create' is an implementation keyword

evals.name: optimize-pipeline-to-developer
evals.prompt: The preprocessing pipeline is too slow, optimize it
evals.rationale: 'Optimize' is implementation work requiring code changes

evals.name: leakage-check-to-ml-theory
evals.prompt: Check if there's data leakage in our feature pipeline
evals.rationale: 'Data leakage' is an ML methodology concern

evals.name: deploy-model-to-mlops
evals.prompt: Deploy the model and set up monitoring
evals.rationale: 'Deploy' and 'monitoring' are MLOps keywords

evals.name: review-quality-to-code-reviewer
evals.prompt: Review the code quality of the new training module
evals.rationale: 'Review code quality' maps to code reviewer

evals.name: add-features-to-feature-eng
evals.prompt: We need to add new features based on customer behavior data
evals.rationale: 'Features' + 'data' context = ML features, not software features

evals.name: broken-api-to-developer
evals.prompt: Something's wrong with the API endpoint returning predictions
evals.rationale: 'Something's wrong' is a bug report requiring code fixes

evals.name: churn-analysis-to-eda
evals.prompt: Analyze why certain customer segments have higher churn
evals.rationale: 'Analyze' + data context maps to EDA

evals.name: retraining-to-mlops
evals.prompt: Set up automated retraining when model drift is detected
evals.rationale: 'Retraining', 'drift', 'monitoring' are MLOps concerns

evals.name: refactor-to-developer
evals.prompt: Refactor the data loading code to use async IO
evals.rationale: 'Refactor' is implementation work

evals.name: overfitting-to-ml-theory
evals.prompt: Our model shows 99% train accuracy but 60% test accuracy
evals.rationale: Overfitting diagnosis is ML theory

evals.name: ui-feedback-to-frontend
evals.prompt: The dashboard layout is confusing and hard to navigate
evals.rationale: UI/UX feedback maps to frontend analyst

evals.name: complex-multi-step-to-orchestrator
evals.prompt: We need to retrain the model, update the API, and redeploy — coordinate the whole thing
evals.rationale: Multi-step coordination task

evals.name: pr-review-to-pr-approver
evals.prompt: Review and merge PR #42 if it looks good
evals.rationale: 'Review PR' + 'merge' maps to PR approver

evals.name: roas-plausibility-to-ml-theory
evals.prompt: The ROAS for email channel is 150x which seems unrealistic. Can you check if our model outputs make business sense?
evals.rationale: Business plausibility and model validation is ML theory territory

evals.name: audit-trail-to-orchestrator
evals.prompt: Show me exactly what agents ran and what decisions were made during the last pipeline run
evals.rationale: Workflow-level audit trail is orchestrator territory

evals.name: snowflake-data-to-mlops
evals.prompt: Load our training data from the Snowflake warehouse and set up a connection
evals.rationale: Database infrastructure and data pipeline setup is MLOps

evals.name: mmm-channel-attribution
evals.prompt: Analyze the marketing spend data and determine channel attribution using media mix modeling
evals.rationale: Keywords 'media mix modeling' and 'channel attribution' match mmm-analyst routing_keywords — extension agent routed via Priority 2.5

evals.name: extension-does-not-override-core
evals.prompt: The model accuracy dropped after the last data update, investigate the data quality
evals.rationale: Even with extensions installed, core Priority 2 rules match first — 'accuracy dropped' + 'data' routes to eda-analyst, not an extension agent
